details.productUrlName: Galadriel of Lothlorien Showcase Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Whenever the Ring tempts you, if you chose a creature other than Galadriel of Lothlórien as your Ring-bearer, scry 3.
Whenever you scry, you may reveal the top card of your library. If a land card is revealed this way, put it onto the battlefield tapped.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
